---
name: Feature Request ✨
about: Suggest an idea for ICPHub DAO
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Proposed Solution

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🖼️ Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples to help explain your feature request.

## 👥 User Stories

As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

Example:
- As a DAO member, I want to see proposal voting history so that I can make informed decisions.
- As a contributor, I want automated rewards distribution so that I don't have to manually claim tokens.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## 🛠️ Technical Considerations

- **Frontend Impact**: [How will this affect the React frontend?]
- **Backend Impact**: [How will this affect the Motoko canisters?]
- **Dependencies**: [Any new dependencies required?]
- **Performance**: [Any performance considerations?]

## 🚀 Priority Level

- [ ] Critical (core functionality)
- [ ] High (important feature)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## 📊 Impact Assessment

**Who will this feature benefit?**
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] DAO members
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Administrators

**How many users will this affect?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Most users
- [ ] Some users
- [ ] Power users only

## 🔗 Related Issues/PRs

Link any related issues or pull requests:
- #[issue_number]
- #[pr_number]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, research, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 🤝 Contribution

- [ ] I'd like to work on this feature
- [ ] I can help with design
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
